win_condition: Party game with optional scoring; most groups play for laughs. If scoring, highest total points at agreed endpoint wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied players share victory or use one bonus lightning round.

categories.label: Correct Guess Points
categories.description: Optional: 1 point to player who correctly guesses original word.

categories.label: Artist Points
categories.description: Optional: 1 point to artist when their drawing leads to a correct guess.

categories.label: Favorite/Best Chain Bonus
categories.description: Optional table-vote bonus points for funniest or best notebook chain.
